backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the Instagram logo link feature implementation in Header.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend component files and their responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference for the React application titled 'Travel All Over World'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component that composes Header, Hero, FleetShowcase, ServicesSection, PricingSection, CallToAction, and Footer into a single-page layout.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: Call-to-action section with prominent phone and WhatsApp contact buttons encouraging users to book rides.
frontend/src/components/FleetShowcase.ts: Fleet showcase displaying three car models (Dzire, Kia Carens, Etios) with images, categories, and passenger capacity in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with business information, contact details, services list, social media links, and caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header displaying logo, business name, Instagram link to karan.pbx05 profile, and call button with phone number 9878784024.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with gradient background, main headline, service description, and primary call-to-action buttons with decorative grid pattern.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Pricing section showing per-kilometer rates (₹16/km), daily rental (₹1500/day), and city-specific routes (Chandigarh, Jalandhar, Ludhiana) with transparent pricing information.
React component displaying a 'Why Choose Us' section with four service cards (Professional Drivers, Safe & Reliable, 24/7 Availability, Best Service) and a highlighted message emphasizing driver quality and customer safety.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options for ICP integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query hooks that interact with the backend; currently exports a simple hook wrapping useActor with no backend methods implemented yet.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a cool blue-teal color scheme for both light and dark modes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a travel business car rental showcase app with features for displaying fleet vehicles, pricing, contact information, services description, and Instagram integration using a cool color scheme.
